name: Pressed Bean Curd Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 4 tablespoons of cooking oil in a wok or pan and fry the bean curd until golden. Remove and drain.
2. Fry green onions for 30 seconds, then add the remaining vegetables (green peas, chopped tomatoes, sweet corn) and stir-fry for another minute.
3. Add soy sauce, dry sherry, brown sugar, salt, and sesame oil to the pan. Mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture to a soup pot.
5. Add stock or water and gently stir.
6. Heat until hot and serve hot.
